name: @libs/orchestrator
description: Internal orchestrator library for Quiz2Biz AI multi-agent system. This package is imported using path aliases (@libs/orchestrator) rather than as a published npm package. The 'private: true' flag prevents accidental publication to npm. For internal distribution across multiple projects, consider: (1) setting up a private npm registry, (2) using npm workspaces with proper package references, or (3) using git submodules/subtrees.
